sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الضِّيَافَةُ جُزْءًا هَامًّا مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo se smatra važnim dijelom arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered an important part of Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَقْبِلُ النَّاسُ ضُيُوفَهُمْ بِتَرْحِيبٍ حَارٍّ فِي بُيُوتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi dočekuju svoje goste s toplom dobrodošlicom u svojim domovima.
sentences.translationEn: People welcome their guests with a warm reception in their homes.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُونَ لَهُمُ الْقَهْوَةَ الْعَرَبِيَّةَ وَالتَّمْرَ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Uvijek im poslužuju arapsku kafu i urme.
sentences.translationEn: They always serve them Arabic coffee and dates.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الضَّيْفُ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالسَّعَادَةِ عِنْدَ زِيَارَةِ أَصْدِقَائِهِ.
sentences.translation: Gost se osjeća ugodno i sretno prilikom posjete svojim prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: The guest feels comfortable and happy when visiting their friends.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ تُقَوِّي الْعَلَاقَاتِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj običaj jača odnose među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: This custom strengthens relationships between people.
